tonight: Blue Lagoon, St. Vincent — charter base and final boat setup.
tomorrow: Blue Lagoon to Bequia, weather and checkout permitting.
dinner: Easy first-night dinner near Blue Lagoon or simple onboard meal after provisioning.
activities: Boarding, stowing gear, provisioning, systems checkout, dinghy check, and crew briefing.
route: Pre-charter setup at Blue Lagoon. Planned first leg is toward Bequia after checkout.
wind: Trade-wind conditions expected. Exact forecast to be checked the morning of departure.
safety: Crew briefing, PFD locations, VHF basics, dinghy rules, anchor plan, and hydration reminder.
funnyNote: Crew morale is high. Captain Ross has declared this a professional-grade vacation operation.
captainMessage: We are at Blue Lagoon getting Inconceivable ready. We are thinking about everyone back home and getting excited for the first leg.

ais.source: manual sample data until AIS or captain GPS updates are active

automationStatus: No AIS position received for MMSI 368392220 within 120 seconds. Keeping last known AIS position instead of using manual fallback.

itinerary.route: Blue Lagoon to Bequia, then settle into the anchorage or mooring field.
itinerary.plannedActivity: First proper island stop, swim check, shore walk, possible dinner ashore, and crew shakedown day.
itinerary.captainNote: Keep the first sailing day simple and comfortable.
